headline: Abbott Laboratories (ABT): One of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June
summary: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) is one of the Best Bargain Stocks to Buy in June. On June 12, BofA analyst Travis Steed reduced the firm’s price objective on the company’s stock to $102 from $120 and maintained a “Buy” rating on the shares. The analyst took a more conservative view on 2027 med-tech company estimates. This is because […]
